description_long: This object consists of three ornate hardcover books, each with a distinct cover color and decorative embossed designs. The first book is dark blue with a gold, intricate, spotted pattern and a central emblem resembling a stylized insect or beetle. The second book is green with a large, black spider motif in the center, surrounded by a plain background. The third book is pink with elaborate gold floral and scrollwork embellishments, featuring a central crest or medallion. All books have visible, slightly yellowed pages and thick covers, suggesting they are vintage or antique. The spines are also decorated, with the green and pink books showing gold detailing. The books are stacked and arranged side by side, highlighting their decorative covers and substantial build.
description: A set of three ornate hardcover books with embossed covers in blue, green, and pink, each featuring intricate gold or black designs and vintage-style pages.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the decorative covers: blue with a gold spotted pattern, green with a black spider, and pink with gold floral embellishments.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the books, the yellowed pages, and the gold detailing on the pink and green spines.
description_view_2: Front-facing view of the spines, showing gold embellishments and the overall rectangular shape of the books.
description_view_3: Angled view from the back, displaying the plain backs of the covers and the thickness of the books.
attribute_cover_illustration: The blue book features a gold, spotted pattern with a central beetle-like emblem. The green book displays a large, black spider motif in the center. The pink book is adorned with elaborate gold floral scrollwork and a central crest or medallion.
attribute_spine_design: The spines of the green and pink books are visible, both featuring gold decorative elements and embellishments. No visible text is present on the spines.
